pages.title: Netherite Treatment
pages.text: When the crucible system is enabled, melt netherite and dip an untreated primary tool part into it.$(p)The treated part keeps its original material and gains $(bold)Nether-Forged$(). This is a physical treatment with its own visible overlay, not a loose assembly catalyst.

pages.title: Nether-Forged
pages.text: $(li)Tool is fireproof$(li)×2 durability$(li)×1.30 physical base damage$(li)Eligible heads gain diamond harvest tier$(p)Nether-Treated and Echoing have been removed from the standard trait roster until a complete, visible treatment process exists for them.
